title: Attachment Downloader for Gmail™ — Zip All
description: Chrome extension that downloads every attachment in an open Gmail™ message in one click, with a Pro auto-zip upgrade. No OAuth, no server.
body_html:
Attachment Downloader for Gmail™ adds a single floating button to every open Gmail message. Click it once and every attachment in that message downloads immediately — no more opening each file and clicking Save one at a time.

It runs entirely inside your own signed-in Gmail tab. There is no Gmail API, no OAuth consent screen, and no server operated by the developer: the extension reads the attachment links Gmail itself already renders on the page, fetches each file inside your existing session, and hands the bytes straight to your browser's download flow. Your email content and attachment data never leave your browser.

What it does

  • Adds a blue “⬇ Attachments” button to any open Gmail message that has attachments, with a badge showing the count.
  • One click downloads every attachment in that message.
  • Free: each attachment saves as its own separate file, using your browser's normal multi-file download.
  • Pro (one-time $12, no subscription): every attachment is bundled client-side into a single .zip file, automatically named from the sender and the date.
  • A small popup shows your current Free/Pro status and an upgrade or manage-purchase button.
  • A toast notification confirms what was downloaded after each click.

How to use it

Install the extension, open any Gmail message that has one or more attachments, and look for the blue “⬇ Attachments” button in the bottom-right corner of the page. Click it to download everything in that message. Free-tier users who download from a multi-attachment message will see a one-time nudge toward the Pro zip-all upgrade; Pro users get a single auto-named .zip on every click instead of separate files.

Purchases are handled by ExtensionPay, a third-party payment processor, entirely on ExtensionPay's own checkout pages — this extension never sees or stores payment details.

Install: Add Attachment Downloader for Gmail™ to Chrome.

See the privacy policy for exactly what data this extension touches and where it goes.

Not affiliated with or endorsed by Google. “Gmail” is a trademark of Google LLC.
